positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed circular mandala illustration featuring intertwined bioluminescent flora and celestial motifs. The style must emulate a deep etched copperplate engraving mixed with clean stained-glass clarity. The composition needs strong, high-contrast silhouettes (deep midnight blue background vs. vibrant cyan and gold flora). The design must be stylized, abstract, and perfect for textile printing. Central focus, perfect symmetry, botanical science meets outer space, vector quality, linocut aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noise, grain, poorly drawn, photographic, realistic, messy, scribble, cartoonish
